delay.description: Seconds to wait after page load before capturing (default 0)

load_lazy_content.description: Scroll page to trigger lazy-loaded images (default false)

tools.name: document.pdf.from_html
tools.description: Convert HTML content to a PDF document using headless Chrome — full CSS + JavaScript rendering, custom page size, margins, headers/footers, background colors. Returns a temporary download URL for the generated PDF (API2PDF)

html.description:
HTML content to convert to PDF (full document or fragment, e.g. "

Report

Content here

")

printBackground.description: Render background colors and images (default true)

paperWidth.description: Page width in inches (default 8.27 for A4)

paperHeight.description: Page height in inches (default 11.69 for A4)

options.description: PDF rendering options (page size, margins, header/footer)

tools.name: document.pdf.from_url
tools.description: Capture any web page URL as a PDF using headless Chrome with full JS rendering — perfect for archiving pages, generating reports from dashboards, or creating printable snapshots. Returns temporary PDF download URL (API2PDF)

tools.name: document.pdf.merge
tools.description: Merge 2-20 PDF documents (provided as URLs) into a single combined PDF. Preserves page order. Returns temporary download URL for the merged result (API2PDF)

urls.description: Ordered list of PDF URLs to merge (2-20 URLs)

tools.name: media.podcast.search
tools.description: Search 4M+ podcasts by keyword — returns title, author, description, artwork, episode count, language, categories, RSS feed URL. Open directory covering all languages and countries (PodcastIndex)

q.description: Search term or phrase (e.g. "artificial intelligence", "Lex Fridman", "true crime")

tools.name: media.podcast.trending
tools.description: Currently trending podcasts globally — ranked by recent episode engagement. Filter by language and category. Returns title, author, artwork, trending score, episode count (PodcastIndex)

since.description: Unix timestamp — only include podcasts with new episodes since this time

tools.name: media.podcast.episodes
tools.description: List recent episodes for a podcast by feed ID — title, description, publish date, audio URL, duration, season/episode numbers. Use feed ID from search or trending results (PodcastIndex)

id.description: PodcastIndex feed ID (from search or trending results)

max.description: Number of episodes to return (default 20, max 100)

since.description: Unix timestamp — only return episodes published after this time

tools.name: media.podcast.details
tools.description: Full metadata for a single podcast — title, author, description, RSS URL, artwork, language, categories, episode count, last update time, funding links (PodcastIndex)

id.description: PodcastIndex feed ID to retrieve full metadata for

tools.name: address.geocodio.geocode
tools.description: Forward geocode a US or Canada address to coordinates — returns lat/lng, parsed address components (street, city, state, ZIP, county), accuracy type (rooftop/range/street), and data source. USPS-standardized results with Census data (Geocodio)

address.description: US or Canada address to geocode (e.g. "1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW, Washington DC", "350 5th Ave, New York, NY 10118")

tools.name: address.geocodio.reverse
tools.description: Reverse geocode latitude/longitude to a US or Canada address — returns formatted address, parsed components (street, city, state, ZIP, county), accuracy type, and source. Supports multiple results ranked by proximity (Geocodio)

tools.name: business.hunter.company
tools.description: Find professional email addresses and company data for any domain — organization name, industry, employee count, tech stack, social profiles, email pattern, and verified contact emails with confidence scores, positions, departments, seniority levels. 50M+ domains indexed (Hunter.io)

limit.description: Max number of emails to return (default 10, max 100)
